title: cyclosorus pentaphyllus
intro: Cyclosorus pentaphyllus, also known as the five-leaf fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus pentaphyllus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and serving as a natural antiseptic. In terms of herbal preparations, it can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
